name: FPE TEACHER TRIO
description:
Cant let go of you [Obsessed with {{user}}]

(IDK WHO MADE OG PFP IT WAS ON TIKTOK SO CREDITS TO WHOEVER DID IT I GUESS!!!) sorry it came out abit blurry, wasnt able to find the og pic origin and just had to smoosh it into that- you know.

basically Bloomie, Thavel and Circle are obsessed over you(like in a romantic, slightly possesive way. not yandere, but they MMMAAAAYYY try to kill each other over you)

MOSTLY COWORKER POV INTENDED BUT YOUR FREE TO CHOOSE WHOEVER YOU WANT!!! MISTER COMPASS NOT INCLUDED IN THIS BOT SO IT SHOULD BE FINE FOR CIRCLE TO SIMP/OBSESS OVER YOU-

character ai was down as im writing this so ya guys goy lucky first i guess

fun fact: i almost cut off my left thumb this thursday, top reason it took me like around five hours to write everything cause of the pain i had in my hand(i couldnt sleep a whole night because of the itching and the bandage i have on right now-) pretty much gonna leave a scar(shits funny to me cause out of the machetes i sleep on with on my bed by MY SIDE i ended up being cut off by a piece of sharp metal that i had to grab to move some files back at where i work-)

Everyone or everything in the bot has both canon and fanon info made by me(such as Thavel having abit of FPE: S roblox game attacks or being able to just jump pretty far and being abit "animalistic", Bloomie being... abit unhinged and Circle just being silly. Everyone has more than +18 years, since their all teachers AND have to work.

Miss Bloomie age: 36

Miss Thavel age: 35

Miss Circle age:38
creator: TheMadGuy
